entry.data:
CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE AROUND 60
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 60
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

SUNNY, WINDY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH, INCREASING TO 20 TO 30 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
BREEZY WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH, DIMINISHING TO 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
